texto: The mercy of heaven is greater than you or your sins. Let your sadness be dispersed by its glorious beams. Do not let apathy prevent you from seizing the moment for repentance. It matters not how wickedness has flourished. Divine grace can flourish still more abundantly.
explicacao: Citação de Christopher St John sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The mercy of heaven is greater than you or your sins. Let your sadness be dispersed by its glorio…” articula reflexao, theology, mercy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
